common.aboutRSpaceDescription:
Designed in collaboration with the University of Wisconsin and three years in the making, RSpace is an electronic lab notebook designed for academic labs. It's also a research 'space' where labs can collaborate with other labs, at your institution or around the world.
And, it's absolutely free!
common.aboutRSpaceIntro: RSpace Community is a new concept.
common.dontReply: Please don't reply to this email, it was generated automatically.
common.notificationPrefNewUser:
When you connect to RSpace for the first time, all of the various notification options will be set to 'on' by default.
If you don’t want to get notifications from RSpace you can set your notification preferences in My RSpace > My Profile. The notifications settings are at the bottom of the page.
common.notificationPrefSuffix: Too many notifications? Set your messaging preferences in MyRSpace -> My Profile
